meaning: adj.记不起的,不被想起的 记不住的 忘却的
examples: Who knows in how many unremembered nations' literatures this has been the Castalian Fountain?
If this is my day of harvest, in what fields have I sowed the seed, and in what unremembered seasons?
Patients may not report difficulty sleeping, because brief interruptions in sleep often go unremembered in the morning.
